description: Controlled tag vocabulary for FoundrySkills discovery. Every tag that appears in any SKILL.md must exist in this file. Tags are the primary discovery mechanism -- they must use user vocabulary, not expert jargon.
expansion_process: Submit a PR adding the new tag with aliases and category mapping. Tag must apply to at least 3 planned skills. Requires review.

tag_rules.coverage: Each tag should apply to 5-50 skills

javascript.description: JavaScript programming language and Node.js runtime

java.description: Java programming language and JVM ecosystem
